mapper.update: /* TM_CL23001_Dao_saveCerExcclcList */ MERGE INTO tm_cl23001 A USING ( SELECT #{cerDelngDe} AS cer_delng_de, #{ecsElcpwstnDivCd} AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, #{cerDelngDivNm} AS cer_delng_div_nm, #{itemNm} AS item_nm, #{cerDelngUpc} AS cer_delng_upc, #{cerDelngQy} AS cer_delng_qy, #{cerAmt} AS cer_amt, #{mrktDivNm} AS mrkt_div_nm, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.cer_delng_de = B.cer_delng_de AND A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd AND A.cer_delng_div_nm = B.cer_delng_div_nm AND A.item_nm = B.item_nm AND A.cer_delng_upc = B.cer_delng_upc AND A.cer_delng_qy = B.cer_delng_qy ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.cer_amt = B.cer_amt, A.mrkt_div_nm = B.mrkt_div_nm, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.cer_delng_de, A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, A.cer_delng_div_nm, A.item_nm, A.cer_delng_upc, A.cer_delng_qy, A.cer_amt, A.mrkt_div_nm, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.cer_delng_de, B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, B.cer_delng_div_nm, B.item_nm, B.cer_delng_upc, B.cer_delng_qy, B.cer_amt, B.mrkt_div_nm, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
